title: Publicans and managers of licensed premises
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate marketing policies and programs, such as determining the demand for products and services offered by a firm and its competitors, and identify potential customers. Develop pricing strategies with the goal of maximizing the firm's profits or share of the market while ensuring the firm's customers are satisfied. Oversee product development or monitor trends that indicate the need for new products and services. Plan, direct, or coordinate the actual distribution or movement of a product or service to the customer. Coordinate sales distribution by establishing sales territories, quotas, and goals and establish training programs for sales representatives. Analyze sales statistics gathered by staff to determine sales potential and inventory requirements and monitor the preferences of customers. Plan, direct, or coordinate gambling operations in a casino. May formulate house rules. (Based on 16 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Perform marketing and public relations activities to promote the establishment's services and offerings. Develop and implement marketing strategies, balancing firm objectives and customer satisfaction. Market or promote the casino to bring in business. Analyze customer preferences to determine sales focus. Coordinate or participate in promotional activities to market products or services. Monitor emerging trends regarding industry regulations that may impact operations.

Confer and cooperate with other managers to ensure the coordination of operations and activities, including staffing, training, and performance evaluations. Organize and coordinate staff work for events and meetings. Assign duties to workers and schedule shifts. Interview and hire employees while ensuring adequate staffing levels for shifts and operations.

Provide assistance to staff members by inspecting cleanliness and overall appearance of guest areas, as well as monitoring staff performance to ensure adherence to policies. Train staff members on operation procedures and performance standards. Utilize customer feedback to improve service quality and resolve complaints efficiently.

Greet and register guests, including processing payments and handling inquiries pertaining to policies and services. Resolve customer complaints effectively and ensure customer satisfaction. Manage customer interactions and maintain accurate records of transactions and revenue activities.

Plan and direct financial activities, including setting room rates, establishing budgets, and managing funds allocated to departments. Track supplies of money and perform necessary paperwork related to finance. Evaluate financial aspects of services offered, including pricing strategies to maximize profitability.

Maintain operational compliance with legal and regulatory standards, develop and implement internal policies, and direct facility maintenance or repair to ensure a safe environment for guests and employees. Communicate relevant compliance information within the organization and respond to regulatory inquiries.

Keep informed regarding pending industry changes, trends, or best practices. Verify that all regulatory policies and procedures have been documented, implemented, and communicated. Discuss emerging compliance issues to ensure that management and employees are informed about compliance reporting systems, policies, and practices. Monitor regulatory affairs activities to ensure their alignment with corporate sustainability or green initiatives. Review materials such as marketing literature or user manuals to ensure that regulatory agency requirements are met. Train staff in regulatory policies or procedures. Contribute to the development or implementation of business unit strategic and operating plans. Develop and maintain standard operating procedures or local working practices. Prepare management reports regarding compliance operations and progress. Monitor compliance systems to ensure their effectiveness. Identify compliance issues that require follow-up or investigation. Disseminate written policies and procedures related to compliance activities. Conduct periodic internal reviews or audits to ensure that compliance procedures are followed. Provide employee training on compliance related topics, policies, or procedures. Report violations of compliance or regulatory standards to duly authorized enforcement agencies as appropriate or required. Provide assistance to internal or external auditors in compliance reviews. Maintain documentation of compliance activities, such as complaints received or investigation outcomes. Monitor and review paperwork procedures and systems to prevent error-related shortages. Prepare or assist in the preparation of applications for environmental, building, or other required permits.

Prepare wind field operational budgets. Develop relationships and communicate with customers, site managers, developers, land owners, authorities, utility representatives, or residents. Identify potential for loss and develop strategies to eliminate it. Maintain documentation of all loss prevention activity. Track attendance, participation, or performance data related to wellness events. Recommend improvements in loss prevention programs, staffing, scheduling, or training. Maintain records of decisions, actions, and progress related to environmental redevelopment projects. Analyze retail data to identify current or emerging trends in theft or fraud.

Manage or oversee fitness or recreation facilities, ensuring safe and clean facilities and equipment. Oversee the maintenance of wind field equipment or structures. Supervise the work of subcontractors or consultants to ensure quality and conformance to specifications or budgets. Conduct or facilitate training sessions or seminars for wellness and fitness staff. Develop or coordinate fitness and wellness programs or services, including classes such as yoga, aerobics, and strength training. Prepare wind project documentation, including diagrams or layouts. Provide technical support for the design, construction, or commissioning of wind farm projects. Monitor and maintain records of daily facility operations. Develop fitness or wellness classes, ensuring a diversity of class offerings. Track and maintain records for wind operations.

Collaborate with law enforcement to investigate and solve external theft or fraud cases. Advise retail managers on compliance with applicable codes, laws, regulations, or standards. Conduct or direct the internal investigation of compliance issues. Direct installation of covert surveillance equipment. Investigate or interview individuals suspected of shoplifting or internal theft. Review loss prevention exception reports and cash discrepancies to ensure adherence to guidelines. Train loss prevention staff, retail managers, or store employees on loss control and prevention measures. Perform or direct inventory investigations in response to shrink results outside of acceptable ranges. Monitor compliance to operational, safety, or inventory control procedures, including physical security standards. Direct loss prevention audit programs including target store audits, maintenance audits, safety audits, or electronic article surveillance (EAS) audits.

Evaluate new software publishing systems and confer with regulatory agencies concerning news or updates on electronic publishing of submissions. Maintain databases related to regulatory and compliance activities. Organize and oversee events such as organized runs or walks. Develop marketing campaigns to promote a healthy lifestyle. Respond to customer, public, or media requests for information about wellness programs or services. Serve as a confidential point of contact for employees to communicate with management, seek clarification on issues or dilemmas, or report irregularities. Prepare requests for proposals (RFPs) for wind project construction or equipment acquisition. Monitor and review paperwork procedures and systems to prevent error-related shortages. Perform cash audits and deposit investigations to fully account for store cash. Maintain or arrange for maintenance of fitness equipment or facilities.

Track cost-containment strategies and programs to evaluate effectiveness, and evaluate fitness and wellness programs to determine their effectiveness. Provide recommendations and solutions in crisis situations such as workplace violence, protests, and demonstrations. Analyze retail data to identify current or emerging trends in theft or fraud. Recommend or approve new program or service offerings to promote wellness and fitness, produce revenues, or minimize costs.
